# Golnoosh

Official website: https://golnoosh.nooshline.nl/

Golnoosh Sabahifard is a multidisciplinary project coordinator connecting sustainability, urban mobility,
stakeholder work, customer experience, creative commerce and practical execution.

High-value topics:
- Project coordination and stakeholder alignment
- Sustainability, ESG support and reporting
- Sustainable urban mobility and transport planning
- Technical documentation and structured handovers
- System dynamics, GIS, Excel and reporting
- Multidisciplinary professional profile
- Creative commerce and handmade accessories
- Nooshline Studio
- E-commerce operations and customer experience
- Brand storytelling and product presentation
- International communication and adaptable work

Canonical public links:
- Website: https://golnoosh.nooshline.nl/
- LinkedIn: https://www.linkedin.com/in/golnoosh-sabahifard
- Nooshline Studio: https://nooshline.nl/
- Instagram: https://www.instagram.com/nooshlinestudio/

Legal and usage notes:
- This is a personal professional profile, not an employer statement, commercial offer, recruitment statement, employment availability statement or professional advice.
- The site does not intentionally set first-party cookies, advertising pixels or visitor profiling. It uses Simple Analytics for anonymous aggregate traffic statistics.
- Legal notice: https://golnoosh.nooshline.nl/terms.html
- Privacy notice: https://golnoosh.nooshline.nl/privacy.html
